# kCVBufferMovieTimeKey

**Global Variable**

The movie time associated with the buffer. Generally only available for frames emitted by QuickTime (type `CFDictionary` containing the [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/kCVBufferTimeValueKey] and [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/kCVBufferTimeScaleKey] keys).

## Declaration

```swift
let kCVBufferMovieTimeKey: CFString
```

## Constants

- **kCVBufferTimeValueKey**: The time value associated with the movie.
- **kCVBufferTimeScaleKey**: The time scale associated with the movie.
